# AddMediaMediaDestinationResolutionResult.Disambiguation

**Object**

A result that requires the user to choose which library or playlist they want to add media items to.

## Declaration

```swift
object AddMediaMediaDestinationResolutionResult.Disambiguation
```

## Clarifying a Possible Match

- **AddMediaMediaDestinationResolutionResult.ConfirmationRequired**: A result that requires the user to confirm the library or playlist before you add media items to it.

items.description: A result that requires the user to confirm the library or playlist before you add media items to it.
items.name: AddMediaMediaDestinationResolutionResult.ConfirmationRequired
